prompt: I'm working on step 3.1 for product-service — setting up Aurora wiring and Flyway migrations. Write the V1 Flyway migration SQL for the products table. The JPA entity has: id (UUID primary key), name (VARCHAR 255, not null), description (TEXT, nullable), price (NUMERIC 10,2, not null, must be >= 0), category (VARCHAR 100), stock (INTEGER, default 0, must be >= 0), a version column for @Version optimistic locking, and created_at / updated_at timestamps. Include appropriate indexes.

assertions.text: Migration filename uses exactly two underscores (V1__create_products.sql format)
Timestamps use TIMESTAMPTZ not TIMESTAMP or LocalDateTime
UUID primary key uses gen_random_uuid() default
Stock and price columns have CHECK constraints (>= 0)
At least one index is created (e.g. on category)
